emails.subject: Cleburne-Tenaska IV Plant
emails.body: Cleburne-Tenaska IV Plant Daren, I'm trying to put together the 2001 Operating Budget for the plant. I need a conservative forecast, per month, of the price that could be obtained by selling our excess volumes. Thanks.

emails.subject: Re: Cleburne-Tenaska IV Plant
emails.body: Re: Cleburne-Tenaska IV Plant Mike, Based on the screen today and current spreads, we may be able to market the excess volumes (in the Waha region) at the following levels for 2001: Jan 4.65 Feb 4.47 Mar 4.26 Apr 4.04 May 3.97 Jun 3.96 Jul 3.96 Aug 3.95 Sep 3.84 Oct 3.96 Nov 4.06 Dec 4.17 Of course, these are only forecasts and are very volatile. If you need anything else, or have any questions, let me know. Daren Mike Mazowita@ENRON 10/25/2000 11:36 AM
